name: Indoor Soccer
author: Poki
description: Indoor Soccer brings the fast-paced thrill of soccer right to your fingertips! Take precise shots, outmaneuver your opponents, and score your way to glory in this realistic indoor football experience. Customize your players, master slick moves, and rise through the ranks in different modes. Ready to flick, kick, and dominate the court? How to play Indoor Soccer? Use the mouse to aim, swipe and release to shoot. Who created Indoor Soccer? Indoor Soccer is created by Finz Games. Play their other games on Poki: Connect Puzzle and Karate Fighter ! How can I play Indoor Soccer for free? You can play Indoor Soccer for free on Poki. Can I play Indoor Soccer on mobile devices and desktop? Indoor Soccer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
